title: MOU Concept
point: Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) is a performance agreement between Government and CPSE.

title: MOU Origin
point: MoU concept arose from the Arjun Sengupta Committee report.

title: SAIL MOU
point: SAIL was among the first PSUs to enter into an MoU.

title: First MOU Year
point: SAIL entered into its first MoU in 1987-88.

title: Ministry Link
point: SAIL signs MoU with the Ministry of Steel.

title: MOU Purpose
point: MoU measures organizational performance against agreed targets.

title: MOU Objective
point: MoU improves critical performance indicators.

title: Performance Measurement
point: MoU evaluates selected key performance parameters.

title: Government Expectation
point: MoU captures Government of India performance expectations from SAIL.

title: Operational Freedom
point: MoU enables efficient commercial operation of SAIL.

title: Policy Framework
point: MoU operates within broad government policy objectives.

title: Accountability
point: MoU incorporates Parliamentary Accountability requirements.

title: DPE Role
point: DPE finalizes SAIL's MoU.

title: Consolidated Basis
point: SAIL MoU is finalized on a consolidated basis.

title: Coverage
point: MoU includes all subsidiaries and joint ventures of SAIL.

title: Subsidiary Evaluation
point: SAIL may evaluate subsidiaries using DPE principles.

title: MOU Framework
point: MoU framework consists of market-oriented performance parameters.

title: Shareholder Focus
point: MoU parameters reflect shareholder interests.

title: Revenue Parameter
point: Growth in revenue is a key MoU parameter.

title: Net Worth Parameter
point: Return on net worth is considered under MoU.

title: Asset Parameter
point: Asset turnover ratio is a key performance parameter.

title: Listed CPSEs
point: Market capitalization applies to listed CPSEs.

title: Benchmarking Basis
point: MoU parameters are indexed to past performance.

title: Future Focus
point: MoU parameters consider future projections.

title: Administrative Vision
point: Administrative Ministry vision is considered for benchmarking.

title: Sectoral Benchmarking
point: Sectoral benchmarking influences target setting.

title: Peer Comparison
point: Peer comparison may be used in evaluation.

title: Quantifiable Parameters
point: All MoU parameters must be quantifiable.

title: Verifiable Parameters
point: All MoU parameters must be verifiable.

title: Public Domain
point: Verification is based on documents in public domain.

title: Government Priority
point: CSR is included as a compliance parameter.

title: MSE Procurement
point: Procurement from MSEs is a compliance parameter.

title: Compliance Penalty
point: Non-compliance results in deduction of full marks.

title: No Partial Deduction
point: No partial deduction is allowed for specified compliance failures.

title: Part 1
point: Part 1 of MoU covers Main Parameters.

title: Part 2
point: Part 2 of MoU covers Compliance Parameters.

title: Revenue Parameter
point: Revenue from Operations is a main parameter.

title: Revenue Unit
point: Revenue from Operations is measured in ₹ Crore.

title: Revenue Weight
point: Revenue from Operations weight is 7.

title: Revenue Target
point: Revenue target for 2025-26 is ₹126667 crore.

title: Finished Steel Parameter
point: Production of Finished Steel is a main parameter.

title: Finished Steel Unit
point: Production of Finished Steel is measured in lakh tonnes.

title: Finished Steel Weight
point: Production of Finished Steel weight is 20.

title: Finished Steel Target
point: Finished Steel target is 180 lakh tonnes.

title: Specialty Steel Parameter
point: Supply of Specialty Steel is a main parameter.

title: Strategic Sectors
point: Specialty Steel is supplied to Defence sectors.

title: Strategic Sectors
point: Specialty Steel is supplied to Nuclear sectors.

title: Strategic Sectors
point: Specialty Steel is supplied to Aerospace sectors.

title: Specialty Steel Weight
point: Specialty Steel parameter weight is 5.

title: Specialty Steel Target
point: Specialty Steel target is 1.00 lakh tonne.

title: Iron Ore Parameter
point: Production of Iron Ore for non-captive use is a parameter.

title: Iron Ore Weight
point: Iron Ore parameter weight is 5.

title: Iron Ore Target
point: Iron Ore target is 50 lakh tonnes.

title: Capital Expenditure Parameter
point: Capital Expenditure is a main parameter.

title: Capital Expenditure Weight
point: Capital Expenditure weight is 10.

title: Capital Expenditure Target
point: Capital Expenditure target is ₹7500 crore.

title: Fuel Rate Parameter
point: Fuel Rate is a main performance parameter.

title: Fuel Rate Unit
point: Fuel Rate is measured in Kg/THM.

title: Fuel Rate Weight
point: Fuel Rate weight is 5.

title: Fuel Rate Target
point: Fuel Rate target is 500 Kg/THM.

title: HR Productivity Parameter
point: HR Productivity is a main parameter.

title: HR Productivity Unit
point: HR Productivity is measured in Tonnes per Employee.

title: HR Productivity Weight
point: HR Productivity weight is 5.

title: HR Productivity Target
point: HR Productivity target is 187.

title: EBITDA Parameter
point: EBITDA percentage of total income is a parameter.

title: EBITDA Weight
point: EBITDA weight is 10.

title: EBITDA Target
point: EBITDA target is 16%.

title: EBITDA
point: Earnings Before Interest Tax Depreciation and Amortization.

title: ROCE Parameter
point: Return on Capital Employed is a parameter.

title: ROCE Weight
point: ROCE weight is 10.

title: ROCE Target
point: ROCE target is 15.46%.

title: ROCE Meaning
point: ROCE measures return generated from capital employed.

title: Asset Turnover Parameter
point: Asset Turnover Ratio is a parameter.

title: Asset Turnover Weight
point: Asset Turnover Ratio weight is 4.

title: Asset Turnover Target
point: Asset Turnover Ratio target is 85.57.

title: Asset Utilization
point: Asset Turnover Ratio reflects asset utilization efficiency.

title: R&D Parameter
point: R&D expenditure is a MoU parameter.

title: R&D Weight
point: R&D expenditure weight is 4.

title: R&D Target
point: R&D expenditure target is 6%.

title: R&D Basis
point: R&D target is linked to previous 3 years average PBT.

title: Innovation Inclusion
point: R&D includes innovation initiatives.

title: Shareholder Return Parameter
point: Total Return to Shareholders is a parameter.

title: Shareholder Return Weight
point: Total Return to Shareholders weight is 15.

title: Shareholder Return Target
point: Total Return to Shareholders target is 100%.

title: Highest Weight
point: Production of Finished Steel has weight 20.

title: Second Highest Weight
point: Total Return to Shareholders weight is 15.

title: Weight Distribution
point: Several parameters carry weight 10.

title: Lowest Weight
point: Asset Turnover Ratio and R&D carry weight 4.

title: Main Parameter Count
point: Part 1 contains 12 main parameters.

title: Total Weight
point: Total weight of main parameters equals 100.

title: Digital Dashboard
point: DPE developed a centralized digital dashboard.

title: Dashboard Purpose
point: Dashboard is used for entering MoU agreements.

title: Dashboard Purpose
point: Dashboard is used for signing MoU agreements.

title: Dashboard Purpose
point: Dashboard is used for monitoring MoU agreements.

title: Dashboard Purpose
point: Dashboard is used for evaluating MoU agreements.

title: User Roles
point: CPSEs are onboarded with designated user roles.

title: User Roles
point: Administrative Ministries are onboarded with designated user roles.

title: MoU Evaluation
point: Evaluation begins after audited data becomes available.

title: Data Source
point: Audited Balance Sheet is used for evaluation.

title: Data Source
point: P&L Statement is used for evaluation.

title: Automatic Scoring
point: Score is calculated automatically on dashboard.

title: Benchmark Evaluation
point: Scoring is done against benchmarked targets.

title: No Exchange Adjustment
point: Exchange rate changes do not affect evaluation.

title: No Raw Material Adjustment
point: Raw material price changes do not affect evaluation.

title: No Finished Goods Adjustment
point: Finished goods price changes do not affect evaluation.

title: Business Risk
point: Price changes are treated as normal business activity.

title: Audited Accounts Prevail
point: Audited statements are final for evaluation.

title: Achievement Rule
point: Proportionate marks apply between 50% and 100% achievement.

title: Minimum Threshold
point: Achievement below 50% earns no marks.

title: Aggregate Score
point: All parameter scores are added together.

title: Aggregate Score
point: Aggregate score is sum of all parameter scores.

title: Final Score
point: Final score is aggregate score minus compliance deductions.

title: Compliance Impact
point: Compliance failures reduce final MoU score.

title: CSR Compliance
point: CSR expenditure compliance is evaluated.

title: CSR Deduction
point: CSR non-compliance attracts 1 mark deduction.

title: Corporate Governance
point: Corporate governance provisions are compliance parameters.

title: Companies Act Link
point: Companies Act 2013 provisions are considered.

title: SEBI Link
point: SEBI LODR regulations apply to listed entities.

title: Board Composition
point: Composition of Board is evaluated.

title: Board Meetings
point: Board meetings are evaluated.

title: Committee Meetings
point: Committee meetings are evaluated.

title: Related Party Transactions
point: Related party transactions are reviewed.

title: Transparency
point: Disclosure and transparency are compliance requirements.

title: Corporate Governance Deduction
point: Corporate governance non-compliance attracts 3 marks deduction.

title: TReDS Platform
point: CPSE onboarding on TReDS is evaluated.

title: TReDS Incentive
point: TReDS onboarding carries 0.5 mark weight.

title: TReDS
point: TReDS stands for Trade Receivables Discounting System.

title: MSE Payments
point: Timely payment to MSE vendors is mandatory.

title: MSE Deduction
point: Failure in MSE payments attracts 3 marks deduction.

title: Procurement Compliance
point: Procurement targets from MSEs are monitored.

title: MSE Procurement Target
point: MSE procurement target is 25%.

title: SC/ST MSE Target
point: SC/ST owned MSE target is 4%.

title: Women MSE Target
point: Women-owned MSE target is 3%.

title: Procurement Deduction
point: Procurement non-compliance attracts 2 marks deduction.

title: Health and Safety
point: Health and Safety initiatives are compliance parameters.

title: Human Resource Improvement
point: HR improvement initiatives are evaluated.

title: Health and Safety Deduction
point: Non-compliance attracts 1 mark deduction.

title: PM Internship Scheme
point: PM Internship Scheme targets are monitored.

title: MCA Scheme
point: PM Internship Scheme is under MCA.

title: Internship Deduction
point: Non-compliance attracts 1 mark deduction.

title: Leadership Development
point: Leadership Development Plan is a compliance parameter.

title: Leadership Deduction
point: Leadership Development non-compliance attracts 1 mark deduction.

title: Surplus Assets
point: Monetization of surplus non-core assets is monitored.

title: Non-Core Assets
point: Land and buildings are treated as non-core assets.

title: Asset Monetization Deduction
point: Non-compliance attracts 1 mark deduction.

title: Excellent Rating
point: MoU score of 90 or above is Excellent.

title: Very Good Rating
point: MoU score of 70 or above is Very Good.

title: Good Rating
point: MoU score of 50 or above is Good.

title: Fair Rating
point: MoU score of 33 or above is Fair.

title: Poor Rating
point: MoU score below 33 is Poor.
